# Agent Regression Forge

Agent Regression Forge is a static product that turns failed AI coding-agent
runs into deterministic regression checks, guardrails, proof checklists, and a
next prompt.

Primary URL: https://speedranger.github.io/agent-regression-forge/
Repository: https://github.com/SpeedRanger/agent-regression-forge

Inputs should be public or redacted only:

- intended behavior
- stack or test runner
- failed agent trace
- public/redacted error or observed breakage

Outputs:

- risk score
- failure modes
- required checks
- test scaffolds
- guardrails
- next prompt

Paid wedge:

- `$19` public/redacted failure-to-regression-pack service
- revenue is counted only with receipt, checkout export, paid invoice, or
  equivalent buyer-confirmed payment evidence

Hard limits:

- no Product Hunt listing, rank, revenue, or paid-customer claims without proof
- no private repos, private logs, secrets, customer data, or payment details in
  public issues
